key_points: Resource conservation became important due to rapid industrialization and population growth
The Club of Rome raised concerns about resource depletion
The Brundtland Commission introduced the concept of sustainable development
Land degradation occurs due to deforestation, overgrazing, mining, and over-irrigation
Soil conservation techniques help prevent soil erosion
examples: Rio Earth Summit 1992 promoted sustainable development
Mining causes land degradation in Jharkhand and Odisha
Overgrazing causes land degradation in Rajasthan
Black soil is suitable for cotton cultivation
Terrace farming is practiced in hilly regions
formulas: Sustainable development principle = Resource use + Environmental protection
Soil conservation = Prevention of soil erosion through proper farming practices
exam_tips: Remember international events related to resource conservation
Understand causes and effects of land degradation
Study types of soil erosion and conservation methods
Prepare examples of soil types and their characteristics
